canonical_text: An intelligence explosion is likely once AI reaches a critical threshold
subject: Nick Bostrom
verdict: Unfalsifiable prediction based on analogical reasoning, not evidence

canonical_text: The orthogonality thesis: intelligence and goals are independent
subject: Nick Bostrom

canonical_text: Instrumental convergence means any sufficiently intelligent AI will pursue self-preservation
subject: Nick Bostrom
verdict: Logically plausible but no evidence in current AI systems
